subcommands.name: open

args.name: ENVIRONMENT
args.description: Set environment to open to. Defaults to development

args.name: FILENAME
args.description: Set input filename. Defaults to .env for development and .env.{environment} for other environments

-y

name: -m
--dotenvMe
options.description: Pass .env.me (DOTENV_ME) credential directly (rather than reading from .env.me file)
